# MoneyBack Plus Credit Card
**Most Rewarding card for Household spends  
**
  * 10X CashPoints at select merchants
  * 2 CashPoints on every Rs. 200 spent on other spends
  * ₹500 worth Gift voucher on Quarterly spends of ₹50,000 or more


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_prodPg_applynow_moneybackplus_CC&icid=website_organic:prodPg_applynow:moneybackplus#nbb "Apply Now")
![Moneyback plus credit card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/moneyback-plus-banner-desktop-v2-1920x550?fmt=webp-alpha)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank MoneyBack Plus Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.
What's in store for you

## More rewards than ever before 
Dining Benefits
  * Get additional 10% off on Swiggy Dineout


Milestone Benefits
  * Gift Voucher worth ₹500 on spends of ₹50,000 per calendar quarter*
  * Note: Already Qualified for Milestone voucher: (opens in a new tab)[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.gyftr.com/myrewards/hdfcbankmoneybackplus/login) to redeem
  * For Steps to redeem the Milestone voucher, [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/millennia-credit-card/pdf/quarterly-spends-milestone-program-mb.pdf)


Cashpoint Benefits
  * 10X CashPoints ( Upto 2.5% valueback ) on Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy and more


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/moneyback-plus-credit-card#cards "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### CashPoint benefits
  * 10X CashPoints(Upto 2.5% Valueback) on Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, Reliance Smart SuperStore & BigBasket
  * 2 CashPoints per ₹200 spent on other spends
  * Pay your Joining Membership fee and get 500 Reward Points


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/moneyback-plus-credit-card "View More")
![Moneyback plus credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Travel and Dining benefits
  * 1% Fuel Surcharge waiver on fuel transactions (Minimum transaction of ₹400, Maximum transaction of ₹5,000 & Maximum waiver of ₹250 per statement cycle)
  * CashPoints can be used for redemption against travel benefits like Flight & Hotel bookings via [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.reward360.in/v2/foryou)
  * 10%* additional discount on Swiggy Dineout using coupon code HDFCCARDS [TnC(opens in a new tab)](https://webviews.swiggy.com/portal-static-page/dineout-hdfc-tnc/)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/moneyback-plus-credit-card "View More")
![Moneyback plus credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * **Interest Free Credit Period:** Up to 50 days of interest free period from the date of purchase (subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant)
  * **Contactless Payment:** Facilitating fast, convenient and secure payments at retail outlets
  * **Smart EMI:** an option to convert your big spends into EMI after purchase. To know more [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi)
  * **Zero lost card liability:** In the unfortunate event of losing your HDFC Bank MoneyBack Plus Credit Card, on reporting it immediately to our 24-hour call centre (Toll free numbers 1800 1600/1800 2600. Customers traveling overseas can reach us at 022-61606160.
  * **Card Management:** Made simple via HDFC Bank [MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfc.bank.in/)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/moneyback-plus-credit-card "View More")
![Moneyback plus credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible?
Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** Minimum 21 years & Maximum 60 years
  * **Income:** Net Monthly Income > ₹20,000


Self-Employed
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age** : Minimum 21 years & Maximum 65 years
  * **Income** : ITR > ₹6 Lakh per annum


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Save up to Rs. 10,000* annually just like 30 lakh + HDFC Bank MoneyBack Plus Credit card holders 
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_prodPg_applynow_moneybackplus_CC&icid=website_organic:prodPg_applynow:moneybackplus#nbb "Apply Now")
![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
The Steps are:
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_prodPg_applynow_moneybackplus_CC&icid=website_organic:prodPg_applynow:moneybackplus#nbb "Apply Now")
![Moneyback Plus Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Fees & Charges
  3. ### Redemption Value
  4. ### Redemption Limit
  5. ### Contactless Payment
  6. ### Additional Features
  7. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions
  8. ### Application Channels


###  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/)**,** a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your MoneyBack Plus Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up your Card PIN
  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions
  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, Manage, Set PIN and Card Controls for Add-on card


  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee – ₹500/- + Applicable Taxes


  * Spend ₹50,000 or more in a year, before your Credit Card renewal date and get your renewal fee waived off 


Please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/moneyback-plus-credit-card/pdf/14jan-fees-charges.pdf) for detailed fees and charges applicable on your HDFC Bank MoneyBack+ Credit Card.
NOTE: For card sourced starting 01-11- 2020, Below T&Cs is applicable 
The Bank reserves the right to cancel the Card in case the Card remains inactive and is not used for effecting any transaction for a continuous period of 6 (Six) months after prior written notice sent on the email address and/or phone number and/or communication address, registered in the records of the Bank.
![Fees & Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Value 
  * 1 CashPoint = Upto ₹ 0.25
  * CashPoints can be redeemed via HDFC Bank NetBanking or by visiting and filling the physical redemption form in the nearest HDFC Bank branch
  * CashPoints Redemption against each category can be redeemed at:

  
| 1 CashPoint Equivalent to  |  
| --- |  
| Product Catalogue  | Upto ₹ 0.25   |  
| Unified [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/foryou) Portal (on Flights/ Hotel Bookings)   | Upto ₹ 0.25   |  
| CashBack  | ₹ 0.2   |  
| Airmiles  | 0.25 airmiles  |  
![Smart EMI](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Limit 
  * A minimum balance of Rs. 500 equivalent CashPoints is required for redemption against the statement.
  * CashPoints can be redeemed up to 50% of the booking value for Flights and Hotel booking. The remaining amount will have to be paid via Credit Card. 
  * With effect from 1st January 2023, CashPoint redemption for Flights and Hotel bookings are capped per month at 50,000 CashPoints.
  * With effect from 1st February 2023, 
    * CashPoint redemptions are capped per month upto 3,000 CashPoints.
    * Up to 70% of Product/ Voucher Value can be redeemed through CashPoints on select products/ vouchers. The remaining amount must be paid via Credit Card.


![Key Image](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payment 
  * HDFC Bank MoneyBack+ Credit Card is enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets.


(Note: In India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder must enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons. You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.) 
![Contacless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Additional Features 
**Zero Lost Card Liability**
  * Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre.


**Revolving Credit**
  * Available at a nominate nominal interest rate. (Check Fees and Charges section for more details)


**Validity**
  * Unredeemed CashPoints will expire/ lapse after 2 years of accumulation


![Additional Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The _[Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf)_ for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.
  * For more details on the card benefits:, [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/moneyback-plus-credit-card/pdf/MBPlus-TnCs.pdf)


![Card Management and Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_prodPg_applynow_moneybackplus_CC&icid=website_organic:prodPg_applynow:moneybackplus#nbb).
  * **2. NetBanking  
**If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply[ log in(opens in a new tab)](https://now.hdfc.bank.in/retail-app/) to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.
  * **3. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/branch-locator) and our staff will help you with the application.


![Card Management and Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is the MoneyBack+ Credit Card?
The MoneyBack+ Credit Card is a versatile card offered by HDFC Bank, providing a range of benefits such as reward points, EMI and a fuel surcharge waiver. This card combines the flexibility of EMI transactions with the added advantage of earning reward points on various expenditures which you can exchange for exciting rewards.
### 
How much credit score is required to apply for the MoneyBack+ Credit Card?
To apply for the MoneyBack+ Credit Card, a healthy credit score is essential. While specific credit score requirements can vary, a score typically above 650 is recommended for a higher chance of approval. Maintaining a good credit score demonstrates financial responsibility and enhances the chances of a successful credit card application.
###  What is the credit limit of the MoneyBack+ Credit Card?
The credit limit for the MoneyBack+ Credit Card is determined by various factors, including the applicant's creditworthiness, financial history, and income. HDFC Bank assesses each application individually, tailoring the credit limit to align with the applicant's financial profile. Higher incomes and stronger credit histories generally result in more substantial credit limits.
###  How can you apply for the MoneyBack+ Credit Card?
You can apply for this card only by clicking here. Other than the official HDFC Bank website, you can also go to the nearest HDFC branch to find the online application form. Fill out the application form. Once submitted, the bank will review the application. Upon approval, the MoneyBack+ Credit Card will be issued.
## For More Frequently Asked Questions
